modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be several noticeable typos and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Inquiry about the Dangerous Weapons and Firearms policy

full_description_text:  
Hola! I was just trying to find out what the Dangerous Weapons and Firearms policy is all about. I mean, I heard some things but I'm not really sure what it covers. Can you help me understand it better? I just want to make sure I'm following the rules, you know?
